creator: niels@heinen.ws
text:
The attached patch will upgrade the port to version 1.0r2. Note that this is a major upgrade (and my first python) port so please review the changes carefully. No problems came out of portlint or the usual port tests. 

The patch is available here:
http://www.heinen.ws/freebsd/w3af_1.0r2.patch.txt

Thanks!!
Niels

Fix: 

Apply the patch:
http://www.heinen.ws/freebsd/w3af_1.0r2.patch.txt
How-To-Repeat: N/A
